items.text: Historically, the acquisition and development of new facilities has both enabled and resulted from market share gains in our core salvage vehicle remarketing business.
items.rationale: This sentence provides historical context about facility acquisition and market share gains without introducing or expanding any specific risk to the business; it's descriptive background framing rather than a risk statement.

items.text: If such attacks are not detected immediately, their effect could be compounded.
items.rationale: This sentence adds a specific detail to an existing cybersecurity/attack risk by noting that delayed detection could compound the effects, which is an elaboration on the severity/consequences of an already-recognized risk rather than a brand-new risk category.
